source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT * FROM
(
SELECT 

	/*
	TRIM(	
	   CASE 
        WHEN RIGHT(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', ''), 1) = '.' 
        THEN LEFT(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', ''), LEN(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', '')) - 1) 
        ELSE REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', '') 
		END ) AS JobNumber,
		*/
		
	TRIM(
    CASE 
        WHEN PATINDEX('%[^a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]%', JOB.ContractID) > 0
        THEN STUFF(
                JOB.ContractID,
                PATINDEX('%[^a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]%', JOB.ContractID),
                1,
                '.'
             )
        ELSE JOB.ContractID
    END
	) AS JobNumber,
	
		CASE 
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='PBC' THEN 'PBC Job Install'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='FHI' THEN 'FHI Job Install'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='RTW' THEN 'RTW Job Install'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='SWR' THEN 'SWR Job Install'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='CTA' THEN 'HRG Job Install'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='MAC' THEN 'MAC Job Install'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='MXH' THEN 'MXH Job Install'
			END AS CustName
    FROM EDW.FACT_JOB JOB
    JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER CST ON JOB.CustomerID = CST.CustomerID 
    LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL MLD 
        ON MLD.JobID = JOB.JobID AND MLD.LP_MilestoneDateTypeID = 'S'
    WHERE 
        MLD.ActualDate >= CAST(GETDATE() - 60 AS DATE)
        AND MLD.ActualDate <= CAST(DATEADD(DAY, 7, GETDATE()) AS DATE)
		AND JOB.ContractID !='NEW'
		AND JOB.ContractID NOT LIKE'VACA%'
		

UNION  

SELECT 

	/*
      TRIM(	
	   CASE 
        WHEN RIGHT(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', ''), 1) = '.' 
        THEN LEFT(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', ''), LEN(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', '')) - 1) 
        ELSE REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', '') 
		END ) AS JobNumber,
		*/
		
		
	TRIM(
    CASE 
        WHEN PATINDEX('%[^a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]%', JOB.ContractID) > 0
        THEN STUFF(
                JOB.ContractID,
                PATINDEX('%[^a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]%', JOB.ContractID),
                1,
                '.'
             )
        ELSE JOB.ContractID
    END
	) AS JobNumber,
	
        CASE 
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='PBC' THEN 'PBC Job Contract'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='FHI' THEN 'FHI Job Contract'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='RTW' THEN 'RTW Job Contract'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='SWR' THEN 'SWR Job Contract'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='CTA' THEN 'HRG Job Contract'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='MAC' THEN 'MAC Job Contract'
			WHEN JOB.DIVISION='MXH' THEN 'MXH Job Contract'
			END AS CustName
    FROM EDW.FACT_JOB JOB
    JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER CST ON JOB.CustomerID = CST.CustomerID 
    LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL MLD 
        ON MLD.JobID = JOB.JobID AND MLD.LP_MilestoneDateTypeID = 'C'
    WHERE 
        JOB.ContractDate >= CAST(GETDATE() - 60 AS DATE)
        AND JOB.ContractDate <= CAST(DATEADD(DAY, 7, GETDATE()) AS DATE)
		AND JOB.ContractID !='NEW'
		AND JOB.ContractID NOT LIKE'VACA%'
		
		

UNION  


SELECT 
/*
TRIM(	
	   CASE 
        WHEN RIGHT(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', ''), 1) = '.' 
        THEN LEFT(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', ''), LEN(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', '')) - 1) 
        ELSE REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', '') 
		END )  AS JobNumber,
		*/
		
TRIM(
    CASE 
        WHEN PATINDEX('%[^a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]%', JOB.ContractID) > 0
        THEN STUFF(
                JOB.ContractID,
                PATINDEX('%[^a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]%', JOB.ContractID),
                1,
                '.'
             )
        ELSE JOB.ContractID
    END
) AS JobNumber,
	
CASE 
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='PBC' THEN 'PBC Job ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='FHI' THEN 'FHI Job ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='RTW' THEN 'RTW Job ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='SWR' THEN 'SWR Job ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='CTA' THEN 'HRG Job ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='MAC' THEN 'MAC Job ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='MXH' THEN 'MXH Job ID'
	END AS CustName	

FROM EDW.FACT_JOB_SERVICE JSV 
JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER CST ON JSV.CustomerID = CST.CustomerID 
LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB JOB ON JOB.JobID = JSV.JobID
WHERE JSV.ScheduledServiceDate >=CAST(GETDATE()-60 AS DATE)
AND JSV.ScheduledServiceDate <= CAST(DATEADD(DAY,7,GETDATE()) AS DATE)
AND JOB.ContractID !='NEW'
AND JOB.ContractID NOT LIKE'VACA%'

) M1
WHERE JobNumber IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
JSV.LP_JobServiceID 	AS TicketNumber,
CASE 
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='PBC' THEN 'PBC Service ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='FHI' THEN 'FHI Service ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='RTW' THEN 'RTW Service ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='SWR' THEN 'SWR Service ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='CTA' THEN 'HRG Service ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='MAC' THEN 'MAC Service ID'
	WHEN JSV.DIVISION='MXH' THEN 'MXH Service ID'
	END AS CustName

FROM EDW.FACT_JOB_SERVICE JSV 
JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER CST ON JSV.CustomerID = CST.CustomerID 
WHERE JSV.ScheduledServiceDate >=CAST(GETDATE()-60 AS DATE)
AND JSV.ScheduledServiceDate <= CAST(DATEADD(DAY,7,GETDATE()) AS DATE)

SELECT * FROM 
(
SELECT 
'SERVICE ID' AS ServiceID,
JSV.LP_JobServiceID AS TicketNumber,
/*
TRIM(CASE 
        WHEN RIGHT(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', ''), 1) = '.' 
        THEN LEFT(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', ''), LEN(REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', '')) - 1) 
        ELSE REPLACE(JOB.ContractID, '-', '') 
		END) AS JobNumber	
		*/
		
TRIM(
    CASE 
        WHEN PATINDEX('%[^a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]%', JOB.ContractID) > 0
        THEN STUFF(
                JOB.ContractID,
                PATINDEX('%[^a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9]%', JOB.ContractID),
                1,
                '.'
             )
        ELSE JOB.ContractID
    END
	) AS JobNumber

FROM EDW.FACT_JOB_SERVICE JSV 
JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER CST ON JSV.CustomerID = CST.CustomerID 
LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB JOB ON JOB.JobID = JSV.JobID
WHERE JSV.ScheduledServiceDate >=CAST(GETDATE()-60 AS DATE)
AND JSV.ScheduledServiceDate <= CAST(DATEADD(DAY,7,GETDATE()) AS DATE)
AND Job.ContractID!='NEW'
AND JOB.ContractID NOT LIKE'VACA%'
) M1
WHERE JobNumber IS NOT NULL
